pageContext.name: Vices: Gossip
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Vices: Gossip Skateboard Deck, featuring the original illustration work of artist Timothy Pittides.  Loose lips sink ships — and now they sting! Timothy Pittides' original Vices series represents our darkest desires and addictions through the lens of 1920s-inspired noir and Art Deco imagery. Venomous words take the form of a scorpion in this macabre piece inspired by malicious whispers and idle talk. Vices: Gossip warns of the danger of speaking wantonly in the company of others, because the things you say might just come back to bite you.  Each Vices: Gossip Skateboard Deck is resin printed on a 7-ply Canadian Maple Street Deck measuring 8.25 wide and 32.5 long. Limited to a numbered edition of only 100 pieces ever produced, this mesmerizing board makes a striking and durable addition to your collection, suited for both practical use on the ramp and for proudly displaying on your wall.  Give in to the temptation and add the Vices: Gossip Skateboard Deck by Timothy Pittides to your collection today.  Skate Deck details:   Original Art by Timothy Pittides Limited edition of 100 8.25 x 32.5 Street Deck Resin Print on 7-Ply Canadian Maple
